title: The Jallianwala Bagh National Memorial Act, 1951
full_text: The Jallianwala Bagh National Memorial Act, 1951 जलियांवाला बाग राष्ट्रीनय स्मारक अधिनियम,1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-25 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 1951-05-01 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Jallianwala Bagh National Memorial Act, 1951 Hindi Title: जलियांवाला बाग राष्ट्रीनय स्मारक अधिनियम,1951जलियांवाला बाग राष्‍ट्रीय स्‍मारक अधिनियम,1951 Long Title: An Act to provide for the erection and management of a National Memorial to perpetuate the memory of those killed or wounded on the 13th day of April, 1919, in Jallianwala Bagh. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 01-05-1951 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
